title: Holographic Display
description: A holographic artifact floating and turning above a glowing pedestal, like a sci-fi projector table. A hologram shader gives it a Fresnel edge glow, travelling scanlines, flicker, and glitch bursts that jitter the geometry and split it into RGB fringes; a cone of light rises from the emitter ring. Pick from 3D solids (including the Utah teapot) or a 4D projection mode — the six regular 4-polytopes (5-cell, tesseract, 16-cell, 24-cell, 120-cell, 600-cell) and a Klein bottle, all embedded in 4D and turning through the fourth dimension. Or upload your own model (.glb/.gltf/.obj/.stl/.fbx). Spin on any axis, 4D rotation, glimmer, glitch, scanlines, and hue are live and audio-mappable (beats spike the glitch, mids drive the 4D turn).
